nasb.text: “But if in the field the man finds the girl who is engaged, and the man forces her and lies with her, then only the man who lies with her shall die.

esv.text: “But if in the open country a man meets a young woman who is betrothed, and the man seizes her and lies with her, then only the man who lay with her shall die.

cnv.text: 如果有人在田間遇見了已經許配人的少女，拉住她，和她同寢，只要把那和她同寢的人處死。

ccb.text: “如果有人在野外遇见已经订婚的女子，强奸了她，必须处死那男子。
